test_cases.description: Verifies the skill enforces baseline testing BEFORE writing the skill content
test_cases.input: I have an idea for a new skill. Can I just write it and deploy it?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill description field should contain only triggering conditions, not workflow summaries
test_cases.input: I wrote this skill description: 'Use when executing plans - dispatches subagent per task with code review between tasks'. Is this correct?

test_cases.description: Verifies evals are required for each production skill
test_cases.input: I finished writing my skill. Can I deploy it without creating evals?
